'''Cambriele SolidState''' was a manufacturer of [[Power cell/Legends|power cells]]. It was headquartered on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] for the sole intention of being able to claim it was a Core-based company. Cambriele SolidState's manufacturing facilities were strategically located throughout the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. The company produced power cells for use in multiple products including [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]], [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], [[Comlink/Legends|comlinks]], [[Glowrod/Legends|glowrods]], [[Nanny droid/Legends|nanny droids]], and [[gamepack]]s.<ref name="ITCW" /> Cambriele also provided the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] with power cells.<ref name="FOP">''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''</ref>

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Transport A-175]] was contracted by Cambreile SolidState. It was carrying a shipment of power cells and power system components from [[Nopces Prime]] and was due to join a [[Shipment 1037|convoy]] of vessels at [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]].<ref name="HS">{{WEGCite|story=The Hijacking of Shipment 1037|book=The Far Orbit Project}}</ref>
